sourceAuthority: user-supplied sprite-sheet reference; strongest current target candidate, but still needs exact crop review before promotion as canonical sprite target truth
measurementLimits: Trusted motion-reference crops are cleaned from a compressed segmented reference video; they are better human-readable targets than polluted sheet cells, but not ROM-perfect final truth.
Remaining source-sheet cell crops are useful provisional pose evidence and should not be treated as final canonical target pixels without human review.
The crops improve role, pose, projectile, explosion, and tractor-beam grounding but do not yet score temporal animation cadence.
Dual-fighter, carried-fighter, boss damage, and capture/rescue transition targets still need composite or temporal promotion.

roleSets.label: Bee Zako
roleSets.coverageRead: 5 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: formation-front, flap-a, flap-b, dive-or-rotation

roleSets.label: Boss Galaga
roleSets.coverageRead: 5 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: formation-front, flap-a, flap-b, damage-state, capture-beam-host

roleSets.label: Butterfly Escort
roleSets.coverageRead: 5 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: formation-front, flap-a, flap-b, escort-dive

roleSets.label: Challenge Specialty Aliens
roleSets.coverageRead: 6 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: dragonfly-or-scorpion-family, mosquito-or-serpentine-family, late-blue-purple-family, flap-cycle

roleSets.label: Player Fighter
roleSets.coverageRead: 4 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: single-ship-front, dual-fighter, captured-or-carried-fighter, ship-loss-fragment-or-explosion-context

roleSets.label: Projectiles And Impacts
roleSets.coverageRead: 5 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: player-shot, enemy-shot, first-hit-impact, enemy-explosion, boss-explosion

roleSets.label: Tractor Beam
roleSets.coverageRead: 3 promoted crop(s); required pose contract: beam-start, beam-mid, beam-wide, beam-collapse

Player Fighter dual-fighter-front
targetCrops.note: Derived dual-fighter target composed from two trusted cleaned player-fighter crops. This prevents the dual runtime state from being scored against a single fighter while preserving the accepted target proportions.

nextBestStep: Regenerate Aurora live runtime comparisons against the corrected Boss, Bee, and Butterfly targets, then promote clean player-fighter and temporal pulse/cadence targets before tuning more runtime sprites.
